title: Earnings Call Transcript: Canopy Growth Q3 2026 Misses EPS, Beats Revenue
text: Canopy Growth Q3 2026 earnings call transcript. The company reported revenue that beat analyst expectations but missed on earnings per share. Q3 2026 revenue performance exceeded consensus estimates. EPS results fell short of analyst expectations. Management commentary revealed mixed sentiments with focus on strategic moves and operational improvements. Adjusted EBITDA losses continued to narrow. The company discussed cost-saving initiatives and market positioning in Canada's cannabis market. International segment performance and Storz & Bickel division results were highlighted. Management provided guidance on future profitability expectations.
